descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} is changed to: choose 1 Command Card from {Ultra Space}, take it out and make it trigger twice the next time it is played, and make the next played Command Card trigger {Dimension Shuttle}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} is changed to: choose 1 Command Card from {Ultra Space}, take it out and make it trigger twice the next time it is played, and make the next played Command Card trigger {Dimension Shuttle}. After using {Annihilation}, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 50% {Final Verdict} to all enemies, and the DMG Amplification and Shield gained from the next Exalt +50%.
